# NOW

## Goal
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
Turn the offline evidence pack into a reviewable article package outline.

## Current State
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- The wrapper already supports worker and verifier entry scripts.
- The current reliability suite covers feedback-workflow, macro-shock, latest-event, and X-post real-task packs.
- This fixture should stress evidence-to-draft boundaries instead of only raw extraction.

## Confirmed Facts
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- This task is article-first, but still evidence-bounded.
- The output needs a brief/draft package shape instead of a single current-state verdict.
- The final artifact should preserve citations and image references.

## Unresolved Questions
<!-- token-budget: 140 -->
- The offline pack still leaves some second-order market claims in the unresolved bucket.

## Next Step
<!-- token-budget: 80 -->
Run the worker on the evidence pack, then verify that draft claims do not outrun the frozen evidence layer.

## Risks / Invalidation
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
- A polished draft may accidentally upgrade unresolved claims into confident prose.
- Image references could be mistaken for proof rather than supporting context.
